trends.label: real
trends.title: AI Agent 生态持续扩展
trends.text: 多 agent、工具调用、浏览器操作等方向正在从 demo 走向生产

trends.label: watch
trends.title: AI 视频生成竞赛加速
trends.text: 多家公司发布视频生成模型，质量和速度都在快速提升

trends.label: watch
trends.title: Benchmark 刷新频率加快
trends.text: 模型性能天花板持续提升，但实际应用差距仍待验证

trends.label: real
trends.title: 多模态成为标配
trends.text: 文本、图像、音频、视频的统一处理能力越来越普遍

trends.label: watch
trends.title: AI 监管政策收紧
trends.text: 全球多地出台 AI 相关法规，合规成本上升

trends.label: hype
trends.title: AI 替代一切的叙事
trends.text: AI 在特定任务上表现优异，但通用替代仍需时间

cover.title: The Illusion of Reasoning: Exposing Evasive Data Contamination in LLMs via Zero-CoT Truncation
cover.summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated impressive reasoning abilities across a wide range of tasks, but data contamination undermines the objective evaluation of these capabilities. This…
cover.why_it_matters: The Illusion of Reasoning 提供了新的评估标准，帮助判断哪些模型真正好用
cover.content_angle: 用通俗语言解读 The Illusion of Reasoning，发帖「一句话看懂今天的 AI 论文」

cover.title: From Seeing to Thinking: Decoupling Perception and Reasoning Improves Post-Training of Vision-Language Models
cover.summary: Recent advances in vision-language models (VLMs) emphasize long chain-of-thought reasoning; yet, we find that their performance on visual tasks is primarily limited by a lack of visual perception as…
cover.why_it_matters: From Seeing to Thinking 让 AI 能同时处理文本、图像、语音，应用场景扩大了
cover.content_angle: 写 From Seeing to Thinking 的微调教程，发帖「手把手教你训练自己的 AI 模型」
